Variables.Name: Spawnables
Variables.Description:
Data-only blueprints for all of the objects that we we're able to spawn.
	  These describe objects and actors that we may instantiate at runtime,
	  or create proxy objects for previewing in the editor.

Variables.Name: Possessables
Variables.Description: Typed slots for already-spawned objects that we are able to control with this MovieScene

Variables.Name: ObjectBindings
Variables.Description: Tracks bound to possessed or spawned objects

Variables.Name: MasterTracks
Variables.Description: Master tracks which are not bound to spawned or possessed objects

Variables.Name: CameraCutTrack
Variables.Description: The camera cut track is a specialized track for switching between cameras on a cinematic

Variables.Name: PlaybackRange
Variables.Description: User-defined playback range for this movie scene. Must be a finite range. Relative to this movie-scene's 0-time origin.

Variables.Name: ObjectsToDisplayNames
Variables.Description: Maps object GUIDs to user defined display names.

Variables.Name: ObjectsToLabels
Variables.Description: Maps object GUIDs to user defined labels.

Variables.Name: EditorData
Variables.Description: Editor only data that needs to be saved between sessions for editing but has no runtime purpose

Variables.Name: RootFolders
Variables.Description: The root folders for this movie scene.
